s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear airbag sensor with the bolt.

item.ptxt: If the rear airbag sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case, bracket or connector, replace it with a new one.
When installing the rear airbag sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

s2.ptxt: Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the rear airbag sensor.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEATBACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat back in the cabin.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat back assembly with the 4 bolts.
Pass the 3 seat belts through and close the cap of the 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Install the floor anchor part with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY CENTER (for Fixed Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)
INSTALL RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear seat reclining control cable.
Engage the 2 clips and claw and then install the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Install the bolt.
Adjust the control lever to set the rear reclining adjuster assembly to its upper most position.
Pull plate A toward the front of the vehicle to lock the plate.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Install the rear side seat back assembly with the bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 clips and 2 claws, then install the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP (for Reclining Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP (for Fold Down Seat Type)
INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the seat cushion, make sure the seat belt buckle is not under the seat cushion.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL BENCH TYPE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Attach the front hooks of the bench type rear seat cushion assembly to the vehicle body.
Confirm that the seat cushion is firmly installed.

atten3.ptxt: When installing the bench type rear seat cushion assembly, make sure that the seat belt buckle is not under the bench type rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

s2.ptxt: Inspect the SRS warning light (See page ).
